class.name: AnsiTerminalState
class.brief_description: ANSI terminal escape sequence parser and state machine.
class.description: Parses ANSI/VT escape sequences from a byte stream, maintaining a virtual terminal screen buffer with cursor position, text attributes, and scrollback. Used internally by the Claude terminal dock to render terminal output.

method.name: feed_bytes
method.description: Feeds raw bytes into the terminal parser. Processes ANSI escape sequences and updates the screen buffer.

method.name: resize
method.description: Resizes the terminal to the given dimensions. Existing content is reflowed.

method.name: get_cols
method.description: Returns the terminal width in columns.

method.name: get_rows
method.description: Returns the terminal height in rows.

method.name: get_cursor_pos
method.description: Returns the current cursor position as [code](column, row)[/code].

method.name: is_cursor_visible
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the cursor is currently visible.

method.name: is_dirty
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the screen buffer has changed since the last [method clear_dirty] call.

method.name: clear_dirty
method.description: Clears the dirty flag. Call after rendering the current frame.

method.name: is_using_alt_screen
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the alternate screen buffer is active (used by programs like vim).

method.name: get_scrollback_count
method.description: Returns the number of lines stored in the scrollback buffer.

method.name: set_scrollback_limit
method.description: Sets the maximum number of scrollback lines retained.
